name: Fortune Cookies #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Add the oil and egg white to the dry ingredients. Stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add water and mix well.
4. Pour about 1 tablespoon of batter into a lightly greased skillet.
5. Spread the batter to form a circle measuring approximately 3 1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Cook on low heat for 4 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Turn the cookie over and cook for an additional minute.
8. Remove from the skillet and place on a paper towel.
9. Place a fortune in the center of the cookie and fold it into half.
10. Fold the cookie over itself to form a boomerang shape.
11. Place each finished cookie in a muffin tin cup to cool.
Makes 8 cookies.
